title: ventilago inaequilateralis
intro: Ventilago inaequilateralis, also known as the Java plum or Ventilago tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ventilago inaequilateralis include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for use in traditional medicine, as well as being used in local food dishes and as a natural dye.
